metadata.description: Orchestration framework for Claude Code: nine Middle-earth-themed pinned subagent roles, dispatch rules, judgment rubrics, risk tiers, and the /tlor-init setup skill. Roles pin model/effort/tools by design; rules enforce delegation discipline and verification.
